description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a side-by-side barrel configuration, featuring a short wooden fore-end and a matching wooden pistol grip. The barrels are matte black, cylindrical, and run parallel to each other, with no visible ribbing or venting along the top. The receiver and trigger guard are constructed from dark metal, with the trigger guard forming a rounded, protective loop around the trigger. The wooden grip and fore-end display a smooth, polished finish, contrasting with the matte metal components. The shotgun lacks a traditional stock, making it more concealable and maneuverable in close quarters. Its overall design suggests a focus on portability and ease of handling, typical of sawed-off or compact shotguns.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a wooden pistol grip and fore-end, and matte black metal barrels. The design is stockless and emphasizes portability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the double barrels, wooden grip, and fore-end, with the trigger guard and receiver clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the twin barrel openings and the narrow profile of the shotgun, with the grip and trigger guard partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrels, grip, and fore-end from the other side, mirroring view 0 but with the grip curving away.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the curvature of the wooden grip and the alignment of the barrels, with the trigger guard and receiver seen from behind.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth, continuous loop and no finger grooves
